sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_intervals (id INT PRIMARY KEY, duration INTERVAL MINUTE TO SECOND);
INSERT INTO time_intervals (id, duration) VALUES (1, INTERVAL '5:30' MINUTE TO SECOND);
UPDATE time_intervals SET duration = INTERVAL '10:15' MINUTE TO SECOND WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, duration FROM time_intervals WHERE duration > INTERVAL '5:00' MINUTE TO SECOND;
DELETE FROM time_intervals WHERE duration < INTERVAL '3:00' MINUTE TO SECOND;
